should_trigger: Design the CI/CD pipeline for the new checkout service.
Set up the GitHub Actions workflow for build, test, and deploy.
Write the deploy pipeline that promotes artifacts from staging to prod.
Wire build-test-deploy with manual approval before production.
What stages should the pipeline have for this monorepo?
should_not_trigger: Write the Terraform for the EKS cluster the pipeline runs on.
Add Prometheus alerts for failed deploys.
Draft the on-call runbook for a failed rollout.
Scan the repo for leaked secrets.
Define the REST endpoints for the service.
Pick which test types we need for the feature.
